title: Get ready for tomorrow’s Cat Walk charity fun run
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Vetcare Animal Clinic’s third annual charity fun run, The Cat Walk, takes place tomorrow afternoon, Saturday 6 September, at the Garden Route Botanical Garden.


> Registration opens at 13:00 at the garden gate, with the run starting at 14:00.


Entry costs just R50 per person, with all proceeds going towards helping animals in need. Pets are welcome too – provided they are kept on a leash.

Alongside the run, participants can look forward to lucky draws, prizes in different categories, and a limited number of stalls where local vendors will showcase and sell their goods.For stall bookings or more information, contact Vetcare Animal Clinic on 044 873 3585 or [email protected]

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
